title: BEM-1298 validation bundle
objective:
Create file governance/tests/run_local_reenable_validation_bundle.py with content import subprocess
import sys

TARGETS = [
    'governance/validators/validate_active_governance_workflow_absent.py',
    'governance/validators/validate_disabled_workflow_template.py',
    'governance/tests/run_workflow_generator_test.py',
    'governance/validators/validate_foundation_all.py',
    'governance/tests/run_bem1284_minimal_governance_loop.py',
    'governance/tests/run_bem1285_ci_e2e_capture.py',
]


def main():
    results = []
    for target in TARGETS:
        proc = subprocess.run([sys.executable, target], text=True, capture_output=True)
        results.append({'target': target, 'returncode': proc.returncode, 'ok': proc.returncode == 0, 'stdout': proc.stdout.strip(), 'stderr': proc.stderr.strip()})
    ok = all(item['ok'] for item in results)
    for item in results:
        print(f"{item['target']}: {'PASS' if item['ok'] else 'FAIL'}")
        if not item['ok']:
            print(item['stdout'])
            print(item['stderr'])
    raise SystemExit(0 if ok else 1)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
